heading: Omitted
label: 1300e–5 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to determination of per capita share amounts and reversion to tribe of shares of individuals whose claims for per capita shares were rejected and whose appeals were denied, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub.
